acceptance_criteria: Signing step runs end-to-end with a test cert.
description: Add an optional code-signing step to the publish pipeline. Document how to use it. Signing is opt-in; unsigned releases continue for community contributors.
notes: Cert renewal is operational; set a calendar reminder before expiry.
steps: Author `build/sign.ps1` using `Set-AuthenticodeSignature` on Windows; document macOS / Linux signing path (or note unsupported).
Author `docs/SIGNING.md` explaining cert acquisition and use.
Update `pub-04` to call signing when configured.
name: [rel-03] Signed module option
